name: Texas Red Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Red Chiles, Ground, To Taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the steak in batches until well-done.
2. Set aside and trim excess fat.
3. Sauté onions and garlic until softened.
4. Add oil to the pot with onion mixture and tomatoes.
5. Mix all ingredients together.
6. Simmer for at least 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Adjust seasoning as needed before serving.
